summary: Converts file extension to language name using a JSON configuration file.
description: The function maps a given file extension to its corresponding language name by querying a JSON configuration. It skips the default configuration and returns None if configuration loading fails.

parameters.name: ext
parameters.description: The file extension to be converted (e.g., 'txt', 'py').

parameters.name: config_path
parameters.description: Optional path to the JSON configuration file. Defaults to 'extract_config/lsp_configs.json' if not provided.

return_values.description: The corresponding language name if found, otherwise None.
